fewShots.question: What do customers typically buy with Product P0023?
fewShots.query:
SELECT
  pa.rhs_item_id,
  pa.rhs_name,
  pa.lift,
  pa.confidence_lhs_to_rhs AS confidence,
  pa.pair_cnt
FROM dbo.product_affinity_topk_named AS pa
WHERE pa.lhs_item_id = 'P0023'
ORDER BY
  pa.lift DESC,
  pa.confidence_lhs_to_rhs DESC,
  pa.pair_cnt DESC;
